name: NVIDIA GPU
description: Pilotes et outils pour cartes graphiques NVIDIA

external.name: Pilotes NVIDIA via nobara-driver-manager
external.description: Installation/changement de pilote NVIDIA via l'outil Nobara unifie (remplace nobara-nvidia-wizard depuis Nobara 41)
external.cmd: command -v nobara-driver-manager >/dev/null && nobara-driver-manager || echo 'nobara-driver-manager absent — installez nobara-driver-manager'
